_comment: Gemini function-calling tool declarations for the Nuria Islamic app. Register these with a Gemini API request (tools[].function_declarations). When the model calls a function, your glue code HTTP-calls the matching Nuria REST endpoint (POST https://api.nuria.one/v1/ask, POST /v1/check-referral) with the args + header X-Nuria-Api-Key, and returns the JSON back to the model. ask_nuria is referral-safe: honor its response field referral_required (authoritative). Derived from openapi/nuria-api.yaml. Terminology: 'in scholarly review' until GIFS signs.

function_declarations.name: ask_nuria
function_declarations.description: Get a source-cited Islamic answer from the Nuria Islamic app, currently in scholarly review. Returns the answer with Quran/Hadith/scholar citations, the school of jurisprudence followed (Hanafi, Maliki, Shafi'i, Hanbali or Jafari), board_reviewed (false until Nuria's scholar board signs), and referral_required. When referral_required is true, do NOT add your own ruling — deliver the referral to a qualified human scholar. This full check runs before any answer is generated.

madhhab.description: School of jurisprudence to follow; omit if unknown.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the answer.

function_declarations.name: check_referral
function_declarations.description: Fast keyword pre-filter that flags obvious fatwa/sensitive questions. NOT the safety gate: it can miss questions that need referral for semantic reasons, so it must not be used to authorize an answer. For actual safety, call ask_nuria and honor its referral_required field. Returns referral_required (boolean).
